3185260.name: Deep in the Dungeon
3185260.description:
About This Game
A roguelike game that challenges players with random placement of monsters and items. Enter a mysterious dungeon filled with dangers and secrets. Every playthrough offers fresh experiences as monsters and items are placed differently each time. Additionally, players can unlock new characters and upgrade skills to improve their chances of survival in this challenging dungeon.

Features
  • Unlock a variety of characters
  • Randomized monsters and items in each run
  • Shop system and skill upgrades
  • Challenging and unique adventures every time
